# Notification diff test for mcpdiff
#
# This script tests mcpdiff's ability to compare MCP files containing notifications
# and identify differences in notification content and order.

# Setup test files with notifications in different orders
-- notif_file1.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "initialize",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"method\":\"initialize\",\"params\":{}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "req2",
      "method": "tools/list",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req2\",\"method\":\"tools/list\",\"params\":{}}"
    }
  ],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"result\":{}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/status",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/status\",\"params\":{\"status\":\"starting\"}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "req2",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req2\",\"result\":{\"tools\":[]}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/log",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/log\",\"params\":{\"message\":\"Operation completed\"}}"
    }
  ]
}

-- notif_file2.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "initialize",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"method\":\"initialize\",\"params\":{}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "req2",
      "method": "tools/list",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req2\",\"method\":\"tools/list\",\"params\":{}}"
    }
  ],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/status",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/status\",\"params\":{\"status\":\"starting\"}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"result\":{}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "req2",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req2\",\"result\":{\"tools\":[]}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/log",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/log\",\"params\":{\"message\":\"Operation finished\"}}"
    }
  ]
}

-- same_notif_diff_order1.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/log",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/log\",\"params\":{\"level\":\"info\"}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/status",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/status\",\"params\":{\"status\":\"ready\"}}"
    }
  ]
}

-- same_notif_diff_order2.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/status",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/status\",\"params\":{\"status\":\"ready\"}}"
    },
    {
      "id": "",
      "method": "notification/log",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"notification/log\",\"params\":{\"level\":\"info\"}}"
    }
  ]
}

# Test comparing files with notifications in different order
mcpdiff notif_file1.mcp notif_file2.mcp
stdout "Notification order differs"
stdout "different notification message"
! stdout "No differences found"
! stderr "error"

# Test with ignore-order flag (should not affect notification content differences)
mcpdiff notif_file1.mcp notif_file2.mcp -ignore-order
stdout "Notification content differs"
! stdout "Notification order differs"  # With -ignore-order, order difference shouldn't be reported
! stderr "error"

# Test with identical notification content but different order
mcpdiff same_notif_diff_order1.mcp same_notif_diff_order2.mcp
stdout "Notification order differs"
! stdout "Notification content differs"
! stderr "error"

# Test with identical notification content but different order, with ignore-order
mcpdiff same_notif_diff_order1.mcp same_notif_diff_order2.mcp -ignore-order
stdout "No differences found"  # With -ignore-order, these should be considered the same
! stdout "Notification order differs"
! stderr "error"

# Test with detailed output
mcpdiff notif_file1.mcp notif_file2.mcp -v
stdout "Notification order differs"
stdout "different notification message"
stdout "notification/log"
stdout "Operation completed"
stdout "Operation finished"
! stderr "error"
